task_description: End-to-end validation of the complete Sleep Audio Pipeline, documentation polish, and project completion. Fix pre-existing test failure, add comprehensive E2E tests, polish all docs (README, ARCHITECTURE, CONTRIBUTING), create SUMMARY.md, perform final cleanup, and commit on a new branch.

verification.summary: All tests pass (56 CDK assertion tests + Lambda processor tests including new E2E validation and retry behavior tests). gofmt compliant. CI workflow updated. Review feedback addressed.
